headline: how to claim FICA tip credit Preparation Checklist — Denver
articleBody:
how to claim FICA tip credit Preparation Checklist for Denver Clients

Before your how to claim FICA tip credit appointment with FICA Tax Credits & Refunds, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact FICA Tax Credits & Refunds at (213) 537-5613 to get started.
